roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S ADD TO CAL MOTN REVW CONDTNS RELEASE/ELECTRONIC MONITORING FILED

/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY TERMS OF RELEASE/X:MOTION IS GRANTED/ACM/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT TO REMAIN ON GPS MONITORING AND TO CHECK IN WITH ACM 6 TIMES WEEKLY BY PHONE/BE/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/X: SFSD AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS ADMINISTRATIVELY DISCHARGED,/X: DEFENDANT HAS POSTED SURETY BOND 00026248 IN THIS MATTER,/CTORD:AS A CONDITION OF POSTING BAIL, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SETFORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/DEF:SHALL BE PLACED ON HOME DETENTIONAND FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD: DEFENDANT MAY BE PERMITTED ATTEND EMPLOYMENT, SCHOOL, MEDICAL APPOINTMENTS FOR SELF AND SPOUSE/CTORD:THAT THE DEFENDANT MAY LEAVE HIS HOME BETWEEN THE HOURS OF 9AM AND1PM FOR THE PURPOSE OF SEEKING EMPLOYMENT/WEAP/WS/X: PHC HEARING DATE OF07-11-19, D11 IS CONFIRMED,/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/STWPX/CTORD:THATTHE DEFENDANT MAY LEAVE HIS HOME BETWEEN THE HOURS OF 9AM AND 1PM FOR THE PURPOSE OF SEEKING EMPLOYMENT/

/CAL: BAIL MOTION/ARG&SUB/MO GRTD/BAIL:50000/CTORD:WITHIN 24 HOURS OF POSTING $50,000 BAIL, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORINGBY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND ISORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD ANDBY THE SFSD/DEF:SHALL BE PLACED ON HOME DETENTION AND FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD: DEFENDANT MAY BE PERMITTED ATTEND EMPLOYMENT, SCHOOL, MEDICAL APPOINTMENTS FOR SELF AND SPOUSE/WEAP/WS/SAORD/SA2: BUENA VISTA PARK (STAY OUT OF)/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: HEARING DATEOF 05-23-19, D11 IS CONFIRMED,/LDPX: 05-24-19/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT: CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: MARK VERMEULEN/  /TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DENOF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:05-24-19/987,2/SHER/BAIL:125,000/X: BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/CTORD: DEFENDANT IS TO POSSESS NO WEAPONS AND WILL BE SUBJECT TO A WARRANTLESS SEARCH IF BAIL IS POSTED/CONTD: BAIL MOTION ON 05-13-19 AND PRELIMINARY HEARING ON  05-23-19, D11  /DOP/
/CAL: SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/DAWT/CTORD: NO BAIL STATUS REMAINS/NB//CONTD: STATUS OF NW HOLD 19011985 AND TO SET ON 08-07-19, D11/DOPC/
